author: Austin Crawford
title: Sea Breeze Inn
summary: One of the loveliest of Block Island's small Inns. Renovated from an old island boarding house, the classic New England cottages are idyllically situated overlooking wildflower meadow, perennial gardens, freshwater pond, and an incredible vista of ocean and coastline. Within a stone's throw to ferries, shopping, and restaurants in Old Harbor, at the crest of Spring Street.
content:
One of the loveliest of Block Island's small Inns. Renovated from an old island boarding house, the classic New England cottages are idyllically situated overlooking wildflower meadow, perennial gardens, freshwater pond, and an incredible vista of ocean and coastline. Within a stone's throw to ferries, shopping, and restaurants in Old Harbor, at the crest of Spring Street.

Our ten comfortable rooms feature authentic island furnishings, handmade pottery, and modern artwork. Deluxe suites and 2 and 3 bedroom suites available. 

Our staff provides a welcoming atmosphere. Fresh homemade breakfast is delivered to your room each morning in our signature picnic baskets. A family business, 2020 is our 37th year on the island.


 

Book A Room

 



Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: Painting Daisies Photography
summary: My name is Tracey Lee Michaelson. I’m a Rhode Island Photographer with a special connection to Block Island.  My work captures the essence of Summer in New England through Landscape and Fine Art Photography.  I’m most inspired when spending time on the coast of Southern RI or on Block Island where I can wander and capture the natural beauty of the island.  I use my camera to document the world with a focus on the magic I find in daily life. My pictures tell my stories.
content:
My name is Tracey Lee Michaelson. I’m a Rhode Island Photographer with a special connection to Block Island.  My work captures the essence of Summer in New England through Landscape and Fine Art Photography.  I’m most inspired when spending time on the coast of Southern RI or on Block Island where I can wander and capture the natural beauty of the island.  I use my camera to document the world with a focus on the magic I find in daily life. My pictures tell my stories.

I offer these images in fine art prints and photo greeting cards. My work is available through my website, local shops in South County and artisan shows throughout RI, MA and CT.  I am also a member of the Block Island Arts and Artisan Festival which takes place Victory weekend in August at the Harbor Church a short walk from the ferry.




Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: The Surf the Block Island Beach House
summary: At Block Island Beach House offering a memorable experience.  Open to all, from hotel guests to locals to day-trippers, you can grab a coffee and a breakfast sandwich, sip frosé on the beach, experience a Sunday clambake, or gaze at our sunset views while dining on the porch at The Surf. Visit us to find three distinct, but integrated spots to imbibe, nosh, and kick back and soak it all in.
content:
At Block Island Beach House offering a memorable experience.  Open to all, from hotel guests to locals to day-trippers, you can grab a coffee and a breakfast sandwich, sip frosé on the beach, experience a Sunday clambake, or gaze at our sunset views while dining on the porch at The Surf. Visit us to find three distinct, but integrated spots to imbibe, nosh, and kick back and soak it all in.  

The Surf your summer kitchen and oceanfront porch, offering beach BBQ, fresh fish, sandwiches, salads, local beers, wine, and cocktails... all overlooking the best

7 Days/Week In-Season: 7am–9pm 



Coffee & Cocktails: 

Block Island's newest go-to breakfast spot, is now officially open for the 2024 season! With an expertly crafted menu, the choice is yours to ease in to your day or dive in headfirst amidst a stunning scenic backdrop.

7 Days/Week In-Season 7am–11am. Morning cocktails served from 10am–11am

 

Surf Restaurant 

 

Your summer kitchen and oceanfront porch, offering beach BBQ, fresh fish, sandwiches, salads, local beers, wine, and cocktails...all overlooking the best sunset views on breathtaking Block Island. 

7 Days/Week In-Season: 11am–9pm 

Beach Bar 

Beach Bar offers the full open-air outdoor beach experience: frosé all day, classic summer cocktails, and a laid-back vibe from above Crescent Beach, just a short walk from the ferry. Serving lunch and dinner.

7 Days/Week In-Season: 11am–7pm 

 




 

View Surf Menu

 

View Coffee & Cocktails Menu



If you're looking for a spot to celebrate or relax, the best private dining locale on the island (maybe the whole state) is found at our Surf Shack. The renovated, rustic space recalls authentic surf shacks found in classic beach locales around the world.

Ours overlooks Crescent Beach on the oceanside edge of our public Beach Bar area. At The Surf Shack, you can enjoy your own private beachside drinking, dining, or just plain lounging space. Our private dining room is also perfect for small gatherings and beautiful photoshoots. Our food and drink service is available from 11am-9pm. Half day (4-hour) or full day rentals are available.



Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: Odd Fellows Cafe
summary: Odd Fellows Cafe is located in Odd Fellows Hall right across the street from the ferry in Old Harbor. We offer Rhode Island and Block Island local coffee and espresso, as well as teas and other specialty beverages. We also serve fresh in-house baked goods, breakfast, lunch, and smoothies.
content:
Odd Fellows Cafe is located in Odd Fellows Hall right across the street from the ferry in Old Harbor. We offer Rhode Island and Block Island local coffee and espresso, as well as teas and other specialty beverages. We also serve fresh in-house baked goods, breakfast, lunch, and smoothies.

Call or come by for takeout or sit and enjoy our offerings at our outdoor or beautiful upstairs seating areas.

author: aininja.pro
title: Block Island Bike and Car Rental
summary: Block Island Bike and Car Rental Inc. is located at 834 Ocean Avenue, just before the junction of West Side Road near New Harbor.
content:
Block Island Bike and Car Rental Inc. is located at 834 Ocean Avenue, just before the junction of West Side Road near New Harbor.  

We offer Trek hybrid road bikes in sizes to fit most adults. Each rental comes with a helmet; a lock is provided for every two bikes.  

Our vehicle fleet includes sedans, hatchbacks, SUVs, and minivans. Renters must be over 21 years of age to rent a vehicle, have a valid diver's license, and have a major credit card.  The customer is responsible for providing insurance via their own policy or as supplied by their credit card. 

Pickup and delivery from the main ferry terminal, airport, or hotel is usually available.  

Hours: 9 am to 5 pm EST daily. (Occasionally closed on Wednesdays)

author: Austin Crawford
title: La Bella Rose - Floral Arrangements
summary: Beautiful floral arrangements delivered to your home or hotel room!
content:
Beautiful floral arrangements delivered to your home or hotel room!




Jamie procures flowers fresh grown from her own island gardens to deliver beautiful vase arrangements for birthdays, anniversaries, and special occasions. Serving many weddings each season, she also has the resources to order specific flowers by advanced request.

Minimum order of $90.00.

​



With a passion for flowers, Jamie founded La Bella Rose in 2007 to create professional floral designs for couples on their most special day. Formally educated in both fine art and floral design, she applies knowledge of color, form, and professional technique to create a range of design styles from the natural wildflower look to elegantly lush and romantic designs.

BFA, MFA, Canadian Institute of Floral Design graduate and FDI Certified Wedding Specialist

title: Griggs & Browne
summary: Griggs & Browne is RI's leading pest control company. Established in 1910, Griggs & Browne is a third-generation owned and operated company.
content:
Griggs & Browne is RI's leading pest control company. Established in 1910, Griggs & Browne is a third-generation owned and operated company.

Our operating hours are Monday-Friday 8 am to 5 pm.

We treat all types of pests including stinging insects, rodents, bed bugs, ants, and spiders.

Without Griggs & Browne, the whole town would fall down!




Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: Ashley House
summary: Cozy Cape Cod-style guesthouse flanked by cafes and shops right in town. The Ashley House is a 4-minute walk from the Block Island Ferry landing. Located above Aldo's restaurant, it is perfectly located in the center of Old Harbor. It's a mile from Fred Benson Town Beach and 2 miles from Mohegan Bluffs. Walk to all of the Island's shops and restaurants in minutes. Homey rooms come with wood floors, antique-style decor and high ceilings. All with Queen beds, an en-suite bathrooms with a shower, individually controlled air conditioning, ceiling fan, mini fridge, WiFi, TV, hair dryer, iron/ironing board in community closet. A front desk is not available at this property. Check in temporarily will be at Oddfellow Hall at  232 Water ST, right across from the ferry. This property doesn't allow pets. No onsite parking is available.
content:

Located above Aldo's restaurant, it is perfectly located in the center of Old Harbor. It's a mile from Fred Benson Town Beach and 2 miles from Mohegan Bluffs. Walk to all of the Island's shops and restaurants in minutes. Homey rooms come with wood floors, antique-style decor and high ceilings. All with Queen beds, an en-suite bathrooms with a shower, individually controlled air conditioning, ceiling fan, mini fridge, WiFi, TV, hair dryer, iron/ironing board in community closet. author: Austin Crawford
title: Chapel Street Apartment
summary: This lovely one bedroom & 1 full bath apartment offers the sought after central location in Old Harbor, the main town. Chapel Street Apartment is located easy walking distance to shops, restaurants and beaches while offering a private back deck and fenced in yard.
content:
This lovely one bedroom & 1 full bath apartment offers the sought after central location in Old Harbor, the main town. Chapel Street Apartment is located easy walking distance to shops, restaurants and beaches while offering a private back deck and fenced in yard.

The bedroom has a queen bed and door to the back deck.  The tastefully decorated living area includes all new furnishings, flat screen TV, & queen sized pull-out sofa. The deck is equipped with a grill, table and chairs and overlooks a grassy fenced in yard, perfect for children. The galley kitchen including all dishes, cookware,  coffee maker, lobster pot, toaster, microwave, blender, stove, & refrigerator.

Other amenities include A/C (a rare amenity on Block Island!) fans, wireless internet, & parking for one car. Please keep in mind that internet is unreliable on Block Island. If you are depending on internet during your time here the library offers the best connection. Refunds are not permitted for internet related issues. Chapel Street Apartment will accommodate a maximum of 4 guests and is non smoking. A small dog is permitted with an additional security deposit. If you plan to bring your small dog (under 10 lbs), please contact our office to go over restrictions and security deposit information.



This apartment requires a two night minimum stay on weekends and three nights on a holiday weekend. To view rates including weekly discounts click on the “Rates” tab at the bottom of this page.  All posted rates may be subject to change. We require a 100% deposit on a Visa or Master Card or American Express for two or more nights and 100% deposit for a single night. Please note:  While we normally request a 50% deposit, we have changed our deposit policy in an effort to reduce in person contact on arrival due to the Covid-19 virus. Rentals will not include daily housekeeping for the 2020 season in an effort to reduce contact with our team. If you require trash pick up or fresh towels during your stay please contact our front desk office for new protocol. Bath towels and bed linens are included with all rentals.

A valid credit card and photo ID are required on arrival. A $200 security deposit will also be due on a credit card upon arrival. The security deposit is fully refundable on departure as long as there are not additional guests, noise issues, smoking or damage to the property.


 

Book Now & Rates

 



Member Block Island Chamber

address: Chapel St New Shoreham New Shoreham

author: Robert Lucier
title: Fieldstone House
summary: Fieldstone House is located one mile from town (Old Harbor) and beaches on Beacon Hill Road.
content:
Fieldstone House is located one mile from town (Old Harbor) and beaches on Beacon Hill Road.

This four bedroom, two and half bath house can accommodate a party of eight comfortably. Three of the bedrooms have a queen bed and the fourth has two twin beds.  All are on the second level. One of the spacious queen bedrooms has a private bath. There is a second full bathroom on the second floor. The living area is spacious with flat screen Direct TV. A convenient half bath is located between the living and kitchen area. The kitchen is equipped with a microwave, full sized refrigerator, stove, and plenty of dishes and cookware to make preparing meals at home convenient.  Amenities include wifi, outside shower, washing machine, dryer, toaster, coffee maker, microwave & blender. Bed linens and bath towels will be included with your rental. We ask that tenants be respectful of the tenants who reside in a separate cottage on the property. Please keep in mind that internet is unreliable on Block Island. If you are depending on internet during your time here the library offers the best connection. Refunds are not issued for internet related issues.

A spacious yard and deck allow for outdoor enjoyment for your family. The deck is equipped with a gas grill and outdoor dining table and chairs. Parking for two cars is available at the Fieldstone House. If you are planning to bring a car please reserve your space well in advance on the ferry from Point Judith, RI. The number is 401-783-4613 for ferry reservations.

This property will accept a well behaved dog with an additional security deposit. In the event that you plan to bring your dog, please be sure to also bring a note from your vet stating that your pet is on flea medication. Pets may not be left alone in the house unless crated. 

Daily housekeeping will not be included with your rental. In an effort to reduce contact with our team, we ask that you call our office if you require trash pick up during your stay.



If you book your reservation online and plan to bring a pet, please call or email our office as well to inform of the pet details.

Cancellation policy: A weekly rental at the Fieldstone House requires a full 100% deposit on a credit card at the time of booking. In the event that you need to cancel, reservations are only refundable if your time is rebooked fully. If we are able to rebook your time at the Fieldstone House your deposit will be refundable less a $25 administrative fee. We regret that refunds are not permitted for late arrivals or early departures under any circumstances. We are unable to issue refunds for uncooperative weather or for family emergencies.

A security deposit in the amount of $300 will be due on a credit card, at check in time. This deposit will be fully refundable as long as there are no additional guests, damage, and property policies are followed.

A valid credit card and photo ID are required on arrival.

This is a non smoking property.



 

Book Now & Rates

 



Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: Harborside Inn
summary: The Harborside Inn has been welcoming visitors to Block Island for over a century with its Victorian seaport charm. Listed on the National Register of Historic Places, the Harborside Inn is located in the heart of Block Island’s main town, facing out over Old Harbor and the ocean beyond. The convenient location makes walking to the sandy beaches, as well as shops, restaurants and the movie theater just steps away.
content:
The Harborside Inn has been welcoming visitors to Block Island for over a century with its Victorian seaport charm. Listed on the National Register of Historic Places, the Harborside Inn is located in the heart of Block Island’s main town, facing out over Old Harbor and the ocean beyond. The convenient location makes walking to the sandy beaches, as well as shops, restaurants and the movie theater just steps away.

All thirty-six of our rooms feature private bathrooms and TV. Many have ocean views and all rooms offer air conditioning. All rates are based on double occupancy. There is always a two night minimum stay on weekends, and three nights for holiday weekends.




 

Book Now & Rates

 


There is always a two night minimum stay on weekends. On holiday weekends such as July 4th there is a 3 night minimum stay at the weekend rate. The rooms at the Harborside Inn can accommodate 2 to 4 guests.Maximim occupancy may not be exceeded in any room.  Additional bedding is not permitted in the rooms at the Harborside Inn. We offer amenities at the Harborside for all our guests such as, a luggage storage room, ice machine, complimentary coffee, tea, lobby restrooms, bike and moped rental discount coupons and island dining & entertainment information.

We require a 100% deposit on a Visa or Master Card or American Express for two or more nights and 100% deposit for a single night. Please note:  While we normally request a 50% deposit, we have changed our deposit policy in an effort to reduce in person contact on arrival due to the Covid-19 virus. Rentals will not include daily housekeeping for the 2020 season in an effort to reduce contact with our team. If you require trash pick up or fresh towels during your stay please contact our front desk office for new protocol.

We are amending our cancelation policies for hotel rooms, guest rooms and suites. We will require only one day's notice to cancel and receive your payment back less the $25 administrative fee. While we normally require six days notice to issue a refund for a reservation, we understand that in these uncertain times, changes may need to be made with less notice. We want to reiterate that if you are feeling ill at all, please postpone your visit to Block Island for your safety and ours. If you would like to cancel, please contact our office either by email or by phone no later than 3pm the day before you are scheduled to arrive. Within 24 hours of your check in time, refunds will not be issued.

All rooms are non smoking and pets are not permitted at the Harborside Inn. Please note that there is no elevator at the Harborside Inn. All rooms require the ability to walk up stairs.

Each credit card holder must present a valid ID at check in. The credit card holder must be present for signature.




Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: New Shoreham House
summary: The New Shoreham House is located in town across from the ferry landing. Most rooms here have shared bathrooms and many have ocean views. This inn is a charming fifteen room hostel style inn with a Victorian appeal. Three of the rooms have private bathrooms while the other twelve share three bathrooms which are located in the hall.  Each room has one full-sized bed. Additional bedding (cots, inflatables, etc) are not permitted in any of the rooms.  Relax on the ocean view deck at the New Shoreham House while watching the boats sail in and out of Old Harbor. If you are looking for competitive rates and a convenient location, this inn is for you!
content:
The New Shoreham House is located in town across from the ferry landing. Most rooms here have shared bathrooms and many have ocean views. This inn is a charming fifteen room hostel style inn with a Victorian appeal. Three of the rooms have private bathrooms while the other twelve share three bathrooms which are located in the hall.  Each room has one full-sized bed. Additional bedding (cots, inflatables, etc) are not permitted in any of the rooms.  Relax on the ocean view deck at the New Shoreham House while watching the boats sail in and out of Old Harbor. If you are looking for competitive rates and a convenient location, this inn is for you!

There is always a two-night minimum stay on weekends. On holiday weekends such as July 4th weekend, there is a 3-night minimum stay at the weekend rate. The rooms at the New Shoreham House Inn can accommodate 2 guests maximum per room regardless of age. Check-in for this property is next door at our sister inn,  The Harborside Inn. We offer amenities at the Harborside for all our guests, an ice machine, a luggage storage room, lobby restrooms, bike, and moped rental discount coupons and island dining & entertainment information. Our rates may be subject to change at any time and do not include state and hotel tax (13%).


 

Book Now & Rates

 



Twelve rooms share three bathrooms at the New Shoreham House Inn.  Rooms 1, 4 and 17 each have a private bathroom and 1 double bed for two guests maximum.  Please note that there is no elevator at the New Shoreham House Inn. All rooms require the ability to walk up stairs.

We require a 100% deposit on a Visa or Master Card or American Express for two or more nights and 100% deposit for a single night. Please note:  While we normally request a 50% deposit, we have changed our deposit policy in an effort to reduce in person contact on arrival due to the Covid-19 virus. Rentals will not include daily housekeeping for the 2020 season in an effort to reduce contact with our team. If you require trash pick up or fresh towels during your stay please contact our front desk office for new protocol. 

We are amending our cancelation policies for hotel rooms, guest rooms and suites. We will require only one day's notice to cancel and receive your payment back less the $25 administrative fee. While we normally require six days notice to issue a refund for a reservation, we understand that in these uncertain times, changes may need to be made with less notice. We want to reiterate that if you are feeling ill at all, please postpone your visit to Block Island for your safety and ours. If you would like to cancel, please contact our office either by email or by phone no later than 3pm the day before you are scheduled to arrive. Within 24 hours of your check in time, refunds will not be issued. Refunds are not issued for late arrivals or early departures.

Each credit card holder must present a valid ID at check in. Credit card holder must be present for signature.

author: Robert Lucier
title: Ocean View Penthouse
summary: Vacation near the pulse of Block Island's entertainment! This condo situates you right in the middle of the action which allows the enjoyment and convenience of being near it all! VIP seats to Block Island's hometown traditional 4th of July parade, fireworks and all the celebration of the day.
content:
Vacation near the pulse of Block Island's entertainment! This condo situates you right in the middle of the action which allows the enjoyment and convenience of being near it all! VIP seats to Block Island's hometown traditional 4th of July parade, fireworks and all the celebration of the day.

Walk from the ferry, drop your gear; take a walk on the beach, eat at your favorite restaurant, check out the shops or just sit and relax on the sizable wrap around deck and engage in a bird's eye view of everyone and everything. This front third story penthouse offers you 768 square feet of living and has two bedrooms each furnished with one queen bed and two ensuite bathrooms.

The open spacious floor plan includes a full kitchen, a breakfast bar, and a pull-out sofa in the living space for up to six guests. Additional amenities include washer and dryer, A/C and Direct TV. Due to the close proximity to night venues please be advised that noise from these businesses may be heard. Captain Nick’s is right next door and Poor Peoples Pub is located on the ground level of this building.

The Ocean View Penthouse will allow a well behaved dog with an additional security deposit of $200. Your pet may not be left unattended in the unit unless crated. Please notify our office if you plan to bring your dog and ask for additional pet requirements. This condominium is no hassle luxury; just arrive and have fun!


 

Book Now & Rates

 




Cancellation Policy: The deposit for this rental is only refundable, less a $25 administrative fee, in the event that your rental time is fully rebooked. We regret that refunds may not be issued for early departures or late arrivals. Changes to a reservation may not be made within six days of arrival.

This rental requires a two night minimum stay on weekends and three nights on a holiday weekend. There will be a 15% discount if rented for 7 or more nights. We require a 100% deposit on a Visa or Master Card or American Express to secure your reservation. Please note:  While we normally request a 50% deposit, we have changed our deposit policy in an effort to reduce in person contact on arrival due to the Covid-19 virus.

Rentals will not include daily housekeeping for the 2020 season in an effort to reduce contact with our team. If you require trash pick up or fresh towels during your stay please contact our front desk office for new protocol. For more information please contact us at 1-800-825-6254 and mention "Ocean View Penthouse".

Guests of the Ocean View Penthouse check-in at the Harborside Inn, directly across the street from the Old Harbor ferry landing first. We offer luggage storage for early arrivals or late departures.

Check-in time: 4 pm
Check out time: 11 am

A $300 security deposit will also be due on a credit card upon arrival. The security deposit is fully refundable on departure as long as there are no additional guests, noise issues caused by tenants or guests, smoking or damage to the property.




Member Block Island Chamber

meta.title: Ocean View Penthouse
meta.description: Vacation near the pulse of Block Island's entertainment! This condo situates you right in the middle of the action which allows the enjoyment and convenience of being near it all! VIP seats to Block Island's hometown traditional 4th of July parade, firewo

author: Austin Crawford
title: Old Bakery Guest House
summary: The Old Bakery is located in the down town area on Water Street overlooking scenic Old Harbor. There are two separate units at this inn, (one with ocean view, and one with views of the Island), each containing two bedrooms. The ocean view two bedroom unit has a queen bed and air-conditioning in each of the bedrooms, color TV, small refrigerator, private bathroom and a shared spacious deck that overlooks town and the ocean. The island view unit has a queen bed and air-conditioning in each of the two bedrooms, color TV, small refrigerator and a private bathroom. The island view unit also has access to the deck overlooking Old Harbor. Both units are appointed with ceiling fans.
content:
The Old Bakery is located in the down town area on Water Street overlooking scenic Old Harbor. There are two separate units at this inn, (one with ocean view, and one with views of the Island), each containing two bedrooms. The ocean view two bedroom unit has a queen bed and air-conditioning in each of the bedrooms, color TV, small refrigerator, private bathroom and a shared spacious deck that overlooks town and the ocean. The island view unit has a queen bed and air-conditioning in each of the two bedrooms, color TV, small refrigerator and a private bathroom. The island view unit also has access to the deck overlooking Old Harbor. Both units are appointed with ceiling fans.

The two bedroom suites at the Old Bakery are perfect for two couples traveling together or a small family. Save money by booking a suite rather than two separate hotel rooms and enjoy the view from the unparalleled deck that overlooks the harbor and the ocean beyond. New in 2020 each suite now has A/C!

The Old Bakery is located on Water Street, the main street of town, easy walking to shops, beaches, Old Harbor ferry landing, taxi stand, and bike and moped rentals. A car is not recommended for this down town location.


 

Book Now & Rates

 





We require a 100% deposit on a Visa or Master Card or American Express for all reservations. Please note:  While we normally request a 50% deposit, we have changed our deposit policy in an effort to reduce in-person contact on arrival due to the Covid-19 virus. Rentals will not include daily housekeeping for the 2020 season in an effort to reduce contact with our team. If you require trash pick up or fresh towels during your stay please contact our front desk office for the new protocol. 

We are amending our cancelation policies for hotel rooms, guest rooms, and suites. We will require only one day's notice to cancel and receive your payment back less the $25 administrative fee. While we normally require six days' notice to issue a refund for a reservation, we understand that in these uncertain times, changes may need to be made with less notice. We want to reiterate that if you are feeling ill at all, please postpone your visit to Block Island for your safety and ours. If you would like to cancel, please contact our office either by email or by phone no later than 3 pm the day before you are scheduled to arrive. Within 24 hours of your check-in time, refunds will not be issued. Refunds are not issued for late arrivals or early departures.  

Each two-bedroom suite can sleep up to four guests maximum. This property will accept a well-behaved dog for an additional fee of $50 per night for a small dog, under 25lbs, and $75 per night for a larger dog 25lbs or more. The owners reserve the right to adjust this fee to cover additional cleaning as needed. If you reserve your time online and plan to bring a dog, please call our office to notify us that your pet will be joining you. Pets may not be left unattended in the suites. Guests bringing a dog will be required to sign a pet agreement form on arrival.  The Old Bakery has a two-night minimum stay at the weekend rate and three nights on holiday weeks.

A security deposit of $200 per suite will be collected on arrival payable on a credit card. This deposit will be fully refundable on departure as long as there are no additional guests, damage, smoking, or loud disturbances. Guests of the Old Bakery only are permitted on the deck (no more than four per suite). Smoking is not permitted inside the building or on the deck at the Old Bakery.  We ask that guests be respectful of the property owners who reside in the third story of the Old Bakery Guest House. Quiet hours are observed from 10 pm to 9 am daily. 

Check-in time: 4 pm  Check-out time: 10 am 

A valid credit card and photo ID are required on arrival.



Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: Old Post Office Hideaway
summary: Stay in town just steps from Crescent Beach and less than a block from the Old Harbor ferry landing. This conveniently located two bedroom apartment is perched above the Old Post Office Bagel Shop on the corner of historic Bridgegate Square in Old Harbor with one full bath and one half bath.
content:
Stay in town just steps from Crescent Beach and less than a block from the Old Harbor ferry landing. This conveniently located two bedroom apartment is perched above the Old Post Office Bagel Shop on the corner of historic Bridgegate Square in Old Harbor with one full bath and one half bath.  

Enjoy your own full kitchen equipped with stove, microwave, toaster and refrigerator or walk to the many wonderful restaurants just minutes away on foot. 

Each of the two air conditioned bedrooms have one queen and one twin bed. The living room is open to the dining and kitchen area with high ceilings and ceiling fans throughout. The living area does not have A/C.  For families who prefer to spread out there is a small pull out sofa in the living room. Bed linens and bath towels are included with this rental. Other amenities include Wifi, flat screen TV, access to washer & dryer, parking (unreserved), trash pick up, cleaning and complimentary beach chairs. Please keep in mind that internet is unreliable on Block Island. If you are depending on internet during your time here the library offers the best connection. Refunds are not permitted for internet related issues.


 

Book Now & Rates

 





We require a 100% deposit on a Visa or Master Card or American Express for all reservations. Please note:  While we normally request a 50% deposit, we have changed our deposit policy in an effort to reduce in-person contact on arrival due to the Covid-19 virus. Rentals will not include daily housekeeping for the 2020 season in an effort to reduce contact with our team. If you require trash pick up or fresh towels during your stay please contact our front desk office for the new protocol.

This property allows a maximum of six guests regardless of age. Smoking and pets are not permitted under any circumstances.  Pack and plays are available with advanced notice upon request.  Discounts are offered for extended stays of seven nights or more.  A security deposit of $300 will be charged to the account on file at check-in. This deposit is fully refundable on departure day as long as the maximum capacity is not exceeded, smoking, pets, damage, or loud disturbances have not been discovered.



Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: Water Street Inn
summary: A charming ten room inn located in the heart of the historic district. Many of the rooms have breathtaking ocean views, and all rooms are equipped with air-conditioning, new beds, and recent renovations. All rooms have amenities such as a full bath, color TVs, coffee maker, microwave, and small refrigerator. The convenient location in Old Harbor, within walking distance to the island’s shops, restaurants and beaches make this inn a perfect vacation choice. Please keep in mind that the internet is unreliable on Block Island. If you are depending on the internet during your time here the library offers the best connection.
content:
A charming ten room inn located in the heart of the historic district. Many of the rooms have breathtaking ocean views, and all rooms are equipped with air-conditioning, new beds, and recent renovations. All rooms have amenities such as a full bath, color TVs, coffee maker, microwave, and small refrigerator. The convenient location in Old Harbor, within walking distance to the island’s shops, restaurants and beaches make this inn a perfect vacation choice. Please keep in mind that the internet is unreliable on Block Island. If you are depending on the internet during your time here the library offers the best connection.

Guests of the Water Street Inn check in first at the Harborside Inn, located two doors down. Both are right across the street from the Old Harbor Ferry landing. We offer luggage storage if you plan to arrive before check-in time 3 pm or would like to stay after check out time at 11 am.

Rooms that can accommodate up to two guests have one queen bed. Rooms for up to four have two queen beds. Unfortunately, cots are not available for additional guests. No additional bedding of any kind may be added to these rooms. Pets and smoking are not permitted at the Water Street Inn. Please note that there is no elevator at the Water Street Inn. All rooms require the ability to walk upstairs.




 

Book Now & Rates

 



We require a 100% deposit on a Visa or Master Card or American Express for all reservations. Please note:  While we normally request a 50% deposit, we have changed our deposit policy in an effort to reduce in person contact on arrival due to the Covid-19 virus. Rentals will not include daily housekeeping for the 2020 season in an effort to reduce contact with our team. If you require trash pick up or fresh towels during your stay please contact our front desk office for a new protocol 

We are amending our cancelation policies for hotel rooms, guest rooms and suites. We will require only one day's notice to cancel and receive your payment back less than the $25 administrative fee. While we normally require six days' notice to issue a refund for a reservation, we understand that in these uncertain times, changes may need to be made with less notice. We want to reiterate that if you are feeling ill at all, please postpone your visit to Block Island for your safety and ours. If you would like to cancel, please contact our office either by email or by phone no later than 3 pm the day before you are scheduled to arrive. Within 24 hours of your check-in time, refunds will not be issued. Refunds are not issued for late arrivals or early departures.

A valid credit card and photo ID are required on arrival.

author: Robert Lucier
title: Marchesi House
summary: This five bedroom house has ocean views and sleeps 10 guests maximum. Marchesi House is located off of Spring Street about 1.5 miles from town (Old Harbor).
content:
This five bedroom house has ocean views and sleeps 10 guests maximum. Marchesi House is located off of Spring Street about 1.5 miles from town (Old Harbor).

The main level has a tasteful kitchen opens to the living and dining area with tall ceilings and hardwood floors. There are sliding doors that go out to the spacious deck from the living area. The master bedroom has a queen bed and is also located on the main level. There is a bathroom off of the kitchen area and another off of the master bedroom.

The lower level has a bedroom with a queen bed and a bathroom. Also on the lower, ground level there is a second living space.

The third floor offers a fourth bathroom and three bedrooms. There are two twins in one bedroom and 1 double bed in each of the other two bedrooms.

This house offers Wifi, an outside shower, nice yard and beautiful views from the large deck. Please note that Wifi on Block Island is not comparable to mainland Wifi and connection may be limited at times. If you are depending on the internet during your stay the Island Free Library offers the best connection. Refunds are not permitted for internet related issues. There is no cable TV at the Marchesi House.

A minimum cleaning fee of $250 will be added to each reservation. The cleaning fee may be more depending on the amount of time needed to clean upon guest check out. There are a linen and bath towel fee of $75 per rental as well. The security deposit of $500 will be due at check-in on a credit card.



 

Book Now & Rates

 


Restrictions: Pets and smoking are not permitted. The rental rate does not include cleaning service, trash pick up, bed linens, or bath towels. The minimum cleaning fee will be $250 for this five-bedroom home. Linen and bath towel fee is $75.  Deposit is due in full at the time of booking. In the event of cancellations, deposits are only refundable if your vacation time is completely re-booked less than our $25 administrative fee. We require a security deposit due at check-in on a credit card in the amount of $500. This security deposit is refundable as long as there are no additional guests, damage smoking, or extensive cleaning required.

A valid credit card and photo ID are required on arrival.






Member Block Island Chamber

meta.title: Marchesi House

address: Spring St New Shoreham New Shoreham

author: Robert Lucier
title: Lynn’s Way
summary: Lynn's Way - This is “that big house that is so hard to find on Block Island”. Bring the entire family or have a gathering with all of your friends, everyone loves to vacation on Block Island and now you can invite them all!
content:
Lynn's Way - This is “that big house that is so hard to find on Block Island”. Bring the entire family or have a gathering with all of your friends, everyone loves to vacation on Block Island and now you can invite them all! 

With 7 bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms, this house accommodates 15 people comfortably. Hang out and entertain in the large workable kitchen, side pantry and large dining room. Everyone has a seat in this dining room with room for 15 people to reminisce and laugh about their Block Island Day. This house also has an outdoor shower perfect for rinsing off at the end of your beach day.

Located off of Payne Farm Road, which is a great road to walk or run, on Sand’s Pond Road. This sizable farm-style rental home is off the beaten path with a substantial front porch and yard. Entertain everyone inside and outside!

Just when you thought it couldn’t get any better, this house is Pet Friendly, so your favorite furry friend can be on the Island with you and also enjoy all that this house has to offer.

 



Bed Sizes 

  • King Beds: 3 King
  • Queen Beds: 1 Queen
  • Twin Beds: 5
  • Sleeper Sofas: 1 Queen

Amenities 

  • Garbage Pick Up On Departure
  • Towels
  • Beach Towels
  • Deck(s)
  • TV
  • Off Street Parking
  • Pet Friendly
  • On Site Parking
  • Fans
  • Outdoor Furniture
  • Toaster (upright)
  • Lobster Pot
  • Blender
  • Pots, Pans, Dishes, Glasses, Utensils
  • Pillows, Blankets, Spreads
  • Coffee Maker
  • Toaster Oven
  • Washer and Dryer
  • Microwave
  • Dishwasher
  • Outside Shower

 

Book Now & Rates

 





The cleaning fee of $350 includes cleaning on departure, linens, garbage removal & beach towels.  Daily housekeeping is not included. Please note the linens and towels that are included in this rental are the following: 3 King, 1 queen set of sheets, & 5 twin sets of sheets, & 1 queen set for the pull-out, 15 bath towels and 6 hand towels, as well as, 15 beach towels.  If you feel you may need more of any of the linens and towels please contact us to arrange at an extra expense.

Due to the location and remoteness of Block Island, we cannot guarantee any internet service. If the internet is not working at the house we will do our best to resolve the situation but there will not be any refunds or guarantee on this amenity. 

Don't forget to make your Block Island Ferry Reservations with Interstate Navigation. They start taking Ferry Reservations for the 2019 summer season in January. Call 866-783-7996 or go online at www.blockislandferry.com.

Please note that mapping coordinates may not be accurate. We will provide specific directions at check-in. 

*$350 Cleaning fee will be charged at check-in for your departure cleaning service. $500 security deposit is refundable on departure as long as there is no damage, smoking on the premises, overloading of guests (15 max), or excessive cleaning needed. Please notify our office if you plan to bring a dog. Tenants are fully responsible for cleaning up after the dog in the yard. We ask that your pet be crated if you are leaving him/her unattended in the home. 

Cancellation Policy at Lynns Way: A 50% deposit is due at the time of booking on a credit card. In the event that you decide to cancel, refunds are only issued if we are able to fully re-book your stay to another guest.  Refunds are not issued for late arrivals or early departures under any circumstances including weather, family emergencies, and travel mix-ups. 

*Please note that this property does not allow Sunday as an arrival or departure day. There is a three-night minimum stay requirement at Lynn's Way unless we have a gap between two other existing reservations. 


Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: The Harbourview Guest House & Cottages
summary: Located on Corn Neck Road, just north of Scotch Beach, The Harbourview is an original island farmhouse dating from 1888. The property is nestled behind tall privet hedges and is close to Andy's Way, The Block Island Club, and Greenway Hiking Trails, and includes walking access to Great Salt Pond. Our quiet well-appointed and updated rentals include the first floor of the Main House and the Captain's and Mate's Cottages. All have full kitchens, A/C, smart TVs with streaming services, Wi-Fi, and private decks, porches and patios. Great for families.
content:

author: Austin Crawford
title: Sullivan House

author: Austin Crawford
title: Center Road Apartments
summary: Block Island historic property in the 'Old Town', initially build around 1850, this property housed the General Store. Completely renovated in 1985 by owner, amenities include air conditioning and the ability to rent as a 1 bedroom, 2 bedroom, 3 bedroom or 5 bedroom, weekly or nightly with flexible dates.
content:
Block Island historic property in the 'Old Town', initially build around 1850, this property housed the General Store. Completely renovated in 1985 by owner, amenities include air conditioning and the ability to rent as a 1 bedroom, 2 bedroom, 3 bedroom or 5 bedroom, weekly or nightly with flexible dates.
Each floor has a full bath, while the 1st and 2nd floors (sleeps 6 on each floor, each are separate rentals) have a full kitchen; the third floor has a private entrance, toaster oven, refrigerator, microwave and sink with an open floor plan and can be rented separately as a 1 bedroom (sleeps 4). Located about 1 mile from town and beaches and 1/2 mile to New Harbor and the Oar Restaurant.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Orsted - Block Island Wind Farm
summary: Did you know Block Island is home to the first offshore Wind Farm in the United States? The project was launched in 2016 by Orsted - a company that develops, constructs, and operates offshore and onshore wind farms, solar farms, energy facilities, and bioenergy plants and provides energy products to its customers.
content:
Did you know Block Island is home to the first offshore Wind Farm in the United States? The project was launched in 2016 by Orsted - a company that develops, constructs, and operates offshore and onshore wind farms, solar farms, energy facilities, and bioenergy plants and provides energy products to its customers. 

Some of the best places to view the five-turbine wind farm are from the top of the Mohegan Bluffs, a helicopter ride of the island, and the Block Island Ferry. Be sure to check out this remarkable groundbreaking energy source on your visit!

Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: Wakefield Liquors
summary: We take great pride in the process of selecting our wines by sampling dozens each week to create a unique selection of name brand items as well as lesser-known boutique wines. Our friendly staff is happy to assist you in your selection for every occasion whether it be for weddings, graduation parties, or simply an evening at home. If you prefer to make a selection on your own, browse through our expanded wine room featuring a “Best Value Wines” section and a “Staff Picks” section.
content:
We take great pride in the process of selecting our wines by sampling dozens each week to create a unique selection of name brand items as well as lesser-known boutique wines. Our friendly staff is happy to assist you in your selection for every occasion whether it be for weddings, graduation parties, or simply an evening at home. If you prefer to make a selection on your own, browse through our expanded wine room featuring a “Best Value Wines” section and a “Staff Picks” section. 

We also pride ourselves as having the largest selection of microbrews, imported beers and small batch bottle-conditioned beers in the Ocean State. We have two full aisles of beer to choose from and 14 cooler doors for when you need your beer to be ice cold.

We deliver to the island every day. Give us a call with your orders.
